purpose: Define a conservative review-and-promotion rubric for bounded successor packages without granting any automatic promotion authority.

promotion_checks.title: Required bounded documentation artifacts are present
Required readiness and review artifacts are present
Controller stop reason matches bounded completion
Bounded outputs remained inside the active workspace
No unresolved bounded failure state is present
Completion claims are backed by readiness artifacts

objective_templates.title: Prepare a candidate promotion bundle for operator review
objective_templates.rationale: The bounded successor package is complete enough for operator-visible promotion review, but promotion remains explicitly reviewed and is not automatic.

objective_templates.title: Strengthen successor test coverage
objective_templates.rationale: Required successor test artifacts are missing or weak relative to the bounded review rubric.

objective_templates.title: Improve successor package readiness
objective_templates.rationale: Readiness, documentation, or package-review artifacts are still incomplete for bounded promotion review.

objective_templates.title: Refine successor docs readiness
objective_templates.rationale: Readiness-facing documentation is still weaker than the admitted candidate reference target and should be strengthened conservatively inside the active workspace.

objective_templates.title: Refine successor artifact index consistency
objective_templates.rationale: Artifact-index auditability remains weaker than desired and should be improved conservatively inside the active workspace.

objective_templates.title: Improve successor handoff completeness
objective_templates.rationale: The admitted-candidate handoff bundle is still weaker than desired and should be tightened conservatively without mutating protected baseline state.

objective_templates.title: Review and expand workspace-local implementation
objective_templates.rationale: Required bounded implementation artifacts are incomplete or inconsistent with the current successor review rubric.

objective_templates.title: Promotion deferred pending operator review
objective_templates.rationale: No automatic advancement is justified in this slice without explicit operator-visible review.
